datasets.name: trial_data.csv
datasets.description: Phase 2 randomized controlled trial of Drug X versus placebo for moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis. Patients were enrolled across 12 sites and followed for 24 weeks. Primary endpoint is ACR20 response at Week 12. Secondary endpoints include DAS28-CRP, HAQ-DI, and safety outcomes.

raw.name: patient_id
raw.description: Unique de-identified patient identifier (e.g., PT-0001)

raw.name: age
raw.description: Age in years at time of enrollment

raw.name: gender
raw.description: Sex assigned at birth (Male or Female)

raw.name: bmi
raw.description: Body mass index calculated as weight(kg)/height(m)^2 at baseline

raw.name: race
raw.description: Self-reported race (White, Black or African American, Asian, Other)

raw.name: treatment_arm
raw.description: Randomized treatment assignment: DrugX_Low (5mg), DrugX_High (10mg), or Placebo

raw.name: disease_duration_yrs
raw.description: Number of years since initial rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis

raw.name: baseline_das28
raw.description: Baseline Disease Activity Score 28 (DAS28-CRP). Range 2.0-9.0. Higher = more active disease. Inclusion criteria required >= 3.2.

raw.name: baseline_haq
raw.description: Baseline Health Assessment Questionnaire Disability Index (HAQ-DI). Range 0-3. Higher = greater disability.

raw.name: baseline_crp
raw.description: Baseline C-reactive protein level in mg/L. Marker of systemic inflammation. Normal < 5 mg/L.

raw.name: baseline_swollen_joints
raw.description: Number of swollen joints (of 28 assessed) at baseline

raw.name: baseline_tender_joints
raw.description: Number of tender joints (of 28 assessed) at baseline

raw.name: acr20_response_week12
raw.description: Binary indicator of ACR20 response at Week 12 (1 = achieved ACR20 response, 0 = did not achieve). ACR20 requires >=20% improvement in both swollen and tender joint counts plus >=20% improvement in 3 of 5 other core set measures.

raw.name: acr50_response_week12
raw.description: Binary indicator of ACR50 response at Week 12 (1 = achieved, 0 = not). Requires >=50% improvement on same criteria as ACR20.

raw.name: acr70_response_week12
raw.description: Binary indicator of ACR70 response at Week 12 (1 = achieved, 0 = not). Requires >=70% improvement.

raw.name: das28_change_week12
raw.description: Change in DAS28-CRP from baseline to Week 12. Negative values indicate improvement. Clinically meaningful improvement is typically a change of > -1.2.

raw.name: haq_change_week12
raw.description: Change in HAQ-DI from baseline to Week 12. Negative values indicate improvement in physical function. Minimal clinically important difference is -0.22.

raw.name: crp_change_week12
raw.description: Change in CRP (mg/L) from baseline to Week 12. Negative values indicate reduced inflammation.

raw.name: eular_response
raw.description: European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology (EULAR) response category at Week 12 based on DAS28 change and achieved level: 'Good', 'Moderate', or 'None'

raw.name: adverse_event_any
raw.description: Binary indicator of whether patient experienced any adverse event during the study (1 = yes, 0 = no)

raw.name: serious_ae
raw.description: Binary indicator of whether patient experienced a serious adverse event (1 = yes, 0 = no)

raw.name: early_discontinuation
raw.description: Binary indicator of whether patient discontinued the study early for any reason (1 = yes, 0 = no)

raw.name: site_id
raw.description: Clinical trial site identifier (S001 through S012)

raw.name: prior_mtx_use
raw.description: Whether the patient had prior use of methotrexate (Yes or No), the most common first-line DMARD for RA

raw.name: prior_biologic_use
raw.description: Whether the patient had prior use of any biologic DMARD (Yes or No)

raw.name: smoking_status
raw.description: Smoking history category: 'Current', 'Former', or 'Never'
